subcodes.first_line: O Lord! I am he who was heedless of the manifestations of Thy greatness in Thy days and lay sleeping upon the couch of heedlessness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای رب انا الذی کنت غافلاً عن ظهورات عظمتک فی ایامک و نائماً علی بساط الغفلة
subcodes.subjects: @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @spiritual transformation
